tagline.line1: No ads. No investors. No agenda.
tagline.line2: Free at the base tier, forever.

footer.privacy: We never share your exact location, real name, or contact info with anyone until you explicitly accept a contact-share request. All profiles are private. We do not index profiles in search engines or generate public profile pages.

home.title: Find someone to do the thing with.
home.tagline: Sport, walks, study sessions, language exchanges, art classes — bring an activity, meet a partner, on your own terms.
home.ctaAria: Get started — choose your age band
home.signInPrompt: Already have an account? Sign in

private.title: Private by default
private.body: Your profile is never indexed by search engines. Your exact location is never shared. Real names stay yours.

safe.title: Safety, not theatre
safe.body: Public meets only on the free tier. Trust scores. Verified badges. Real reporting that goes somewhere.

free.title: Free forever
free.body: No ads. No investors. No engagement-bait. Optional paid features once Phase 5 ships.

install.banner: Add HiveActivityPartner to your home screen — opens like an app, no app store needed.

firstVisit.body: Pick your age band, then create a profile. Phase 2 adds the activity picker; Phase 3 turns on matching.

signup.title: Tell us your age band
signup.lead: We never show your exact age — but we have to know you're 18+ before any profile goes live. This is the one question we won't let you skip.
signup.help: Required at signup. We use it to keep matches in compatible ranges. Pick the band that fits.
signup.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
signup.errorPick: Pick an age band before continuing.

options.requiresVerification: Stripe Identity verification required for this band — finishes after signup.

under18.title: HiveActivityPartner is 18+ only.
under18.lead: We can't sign you up. That's a hard rule, not something we'll waive — meeting strangers is risky enough for adults, and we're not in the business of putting under-18s in those rooms.
under18.resourcesTitle: Some good resources for you (or for the adult who showed you this)

resources.commonSense: honest reviews of apps and games, with a clear-eyed take on what's actually risky vs. what's just loud.
resources.connectSafely: research-backed guides on online safety, written for teens and parents.
resources.thinkuknow: online safety education from the UK's National Crime Agency, with age-appropriate resources from age 4 up.

under18.parentNote: Parents: if you arrived here because you saw HiveActivityPartner on your kid's screen, the link almost certainly came from somewhere else — we don't market to under-18s and we never index pages publicly. Worth a chat about how they found it.
